bio: software engineer with 20+ years building for the web, focused on the frontend — design systems, ui components, interaction, and motion. full-stack depth when a project needs it. currently running [third index](https://thirdindex.co), a small independent studio. available for fractional and contract work.

timeline.title: modern treasury
timeline.description: built interfaces for an enterprise fintech platform processing billions in payments annually. contributed to motion patterns, component systems, and headless cms infrastructure.

timeline.title: metropolis
timeline.description: built smart contract deployment tooling (metal.build) and dao governance products (pod.xyz). worked across evm-compatible dapps, farcaster integrations, and web3 frontends.

timeline.title: freelance
timeline.description: contract work across agencies, publishers, consumer brands, and fintech. clients include elara pictures, amazon, pentagram, and axoni. built marketplaces, editorial systems, and product interfaces.

timeline.title: vice media
timeline.description: led a team of 10 building the publishing platform for vice, noisey, motherboard, and munchies. migrated from legacy lamp stack to microservices and react. established component systems and frontend standards.

timeline.title: condé nast
timeline.description: built responsive sites for gq, wired, and architectural digest. collaborated with internal teams, global brands, and agencies on editorial features and campaigns.

work.title: bankroll.fyi
work.description: bankroll management for poker players. log sessions in natural language, track variance and roi, and see which games and stakes are actually profitable.

work.title: legend.xyz
work.description: marketing site for an embedded smart contract wallet built on open defi protocols. custom webgl moments and scroll-driven sequences across the homepage and product pages.

work.title: amazon: the bar
work.description: site for a creative agency that builds for amazon. custom animation, editorial layouts, typography that carries the brand. nothing off the shelf.

work.title: one/of
work.description: commerce for a made-to-order fashion label. custom booking flow for in-person fittings, headless shopify checkout for ready-to-ship pieces. two purchase models, one buying system.

work.title: elara.world
work.description: community platform pairing editorial content with a merchandise store. publishing and commerce running on the same frontend, with one shared design language.

work.title: revolve law
work.description: site for a law firm that wanted to look like neither a law firm nor a tech company. restrained type, quiet motion, a contact flow that gets people to the right place in two clicks.

work.title: kelvon agee
work.description: portfolio for a photographer. full-bleed imagery, ruthless image optimization, typography kept out of the way. the work stays in front.

work.title: the well
work.description: wellness platform combining e-commerce, appointment booking, and member access. shopify for products, custom scheduling for services, member state shared across all of it.

work.title: el dorado
work.description: architecture studio portfolio. project pages built around process — drawings, material studies, site photography — not just finished shots. the site reads like a monograph.

work.title: modern treasury
work.description: ui and component work for a fintech platform processing over a billion dollars in payments annually. marketing surfaces and in-app patterns built against a shared design system.

work.title: vice
work.description: editorial platform serving millions of readers. real-time content delivery, ad integration, and a frontend that had to hold up under breaking-news traffic spikes.
